headlines.description: — Elliot Cadeau scored 10 of his 19 points in the opening minutes of the first half and Yaxel Lendeborg had 13 of 15 points in the second half, leading No. 3 Michigan to an 86-72...
headlines.shortLinkText: No. 3 Michigan blitzes and beats Indiana 86-72 for 3rd straight win, handing Hoosiers 4th L in a row

events.name: UCF Knights at Iowa State Cyclones

headlines.description: — Joshua Jefferson had 17 points, 10 rebounds and a career-high 12 assists for his second triple-double of the season as No. 9 Iowa State defeated UCF 87-57 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Joshua Jefferson's second triple-double leads No. 9 Iowa State over UCF 87-57
